# Holistic Solutions Case Management

> Holistic Solutions Case Management is a clinical case management practice serving clients nationwide. Every case manager is a licensed clinician. Every clinical intervention is led by a master's-level licensed clinician — not a certified interventionist. Founded by Jack Foley, LMFT, the practice specializes in substance use disorders, psychosis, co-occurring (dual diagnosis) presentations, and clinical interventions.

## What we do

- **Substance use case management** — coordinated care for alcohol and drug use disorders across detox, residential, PHP, IOP, and outpatient.
- **Mental health and psychosis case management** — provider matching for complex psychiatric presentations including first-episode psychosis, schizophrenia spectrum disorders, treatment-resistant depression, trauma, and PTSD.
- **Co-occurring disorders (dual diagnosis) case management** — integrated care planning that holds substance use and mental health in a single coordinated plan.
- **Clinical intervention services** — structured family interventions led by master's-level licensed clinicians, with treatment placement coordinated in advance.
- **Treatment placement** — clinical matching to vetted treatment programs nationwide, with insurance verification and admissions coordination.
- **Recovery coaching** — ongoing one-on-one accountability, structure, and relapse prevention support.
- **Companionship and support services** — clinically-supervised in-person presence during high-risk moments and treatment transitions.
- **Safe and clinical transport** — supervised escort to treatment facilities, appointments, and step-down programs.

## Who we serve

Individuals and families navigating substance use disorders, serious mental illness, or co-occurring conditions. Frequent client profiles include first-episode psychosis families, executives and professionals seeking discreet support, families of treatment-resistant loved ones, and clients who have been through care before without lasting results.

## Coverage

Nationwide. Las Vegas, Los Angeles, and New York City have dedicated location pages. The practice is headquartered in Los Angeles with founding roots in Las Vegas.

## Founder

Jack Foley, LMFT — Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist (California). M.S. Clinical Psychology, B.S. Psychology. Specializes in substance use disorders, psychosis, anosognosia, motivational interviewing, CRAFT, and clinical case management.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (702) 494-7641
- **Email:** info@hscasemanagement.com
- **Hours:** Monday – Friday, 8am – 6pm
- **All inquiries are confidential.**

## Editorial principles

- Person-first language throughout.
- No outcome promises or unsupported clinical claims.
- 988 crisis reference on all psychosis- and crisis-adjacent content.
- All consultations are confidential.

## Crisis resources (not a substitute for emergency services)

If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text **988** (Suicide and Crisis Lifeline) or **911**. Holistic Solutions Case Management is not an emergency service.
